headline: Bernstein’s mid-year CIO survey calls for strong IT budget growth in 2026
summary: Investing.com -- Bernstein's mid-year CIO survey reaffirmed expectations for strong IT budget growth in 2026, with growth similar to 2025 and rivaling the strength seen during the COVID-era rebound in 2021, according to a note from analyst Peter Weed on Wednesday.

headline: Tenon Expands Marketing Automation into the ServiceNow AI Platform, Unifying Customer Engagement Across the Enterprise
summary: INDIANAPOLIS, July 15, 2026--ServiceNow is a global leader in customer service, field service, sales, and operations, delivering AI-powered experiences on a single, unified CRM platform. By partnering with Tenon, organizations can now extend omnichannel marketing automation and AI-powered engagement within the same platform managing their end-to-end customer experience.
